nasb.text: But some of the Pharisees said, “Why do you do what is not lawful on the Sabbath?”

esv.text: But some of the Pharisees said, “Why are you doing what is not lawful to do on the Sabbath?”

cnv.text: 有幾個法利賽人說：“你們為甚麼作安息日不可作的事呢？”

ccb.text: 有些法利赛人说：“你们为什么做在安息日不准做的事？”

csbs.text: 有一些法利赛人说：“你们为什么做安息日不可以做的事呢？”
